name: claude-session-guardian
description: Monitor Claude Code's 5-hour and 7-day rate limit windows via background detector + reactor skill. Adaptive polling cadence (5min in quiet zones, down to 1min in red/critical) and event-only notifications (no periodic heartbeats) keep overhead near zero in idle sessions. Auto-detects zone upgrades at thresholds 50/65/75/85. v1.1.3 — pre-emptive resume cron is scheduled on the FIRST risk signal (yellow @ 65%), not only at HARD STOP, so a dormant session resumes after reset even if it stops short of critical. Cancels itself cleanly when the user manages the rate limit naturally (RESET_DETECTED).
